docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $915.00 FILED BY PASTA BELLA A PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT MARKET SHARE ADVERTISING CO MOORE CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARKET SHARE ADVERTISING CO MOORE CHARLES
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-23-1991, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUN-14-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PASTA BELLA A PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKET SHARE ADVERTISING CO $915.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $948.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
